mission.title: akri: Consider implementing a validator for Configurations
mission.description: Consider implementing a validator for Configurations. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current akri deployment
steps.description:
Verify your akri version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n akri -l app.kubernetes.io/name=akri
helm list -n akri 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working akri installation.

steps.title: Review akri configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant akri configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n akri -l app.kubernetes.io/name=akri
kubectl get configmap -n akri -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=akri
```
`kubectl` validates (some?) specs when these are applied.

`Configurations` (Akri CRD) are not validated and this permits user-error and other mistakes to escape.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Consider implementing a validator for Configurations
steps.description:
Prematurely opening the PR to politely solicit in-flight reviews; the PR is not yet ready to be accepted.

The Webhook container can be built out-of-band:

```bash
REPO="ghcr.io/deislabs/akri"
TAGS="v1"

docker build \
--tag=${REPO}:${TAGS}
```yaml

steps.title: Upgrade akri to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade akri:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade akri akri/akri --namespace akri
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n akri
helm list -n akri
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n akri -l app.kubernetes.io/name=akri
kubectl get events -n akri --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Consider implementing a validator for Configurations" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Prematurely opening the PR to politely solicit in-flight reviews; the PR is not yet ready to be accepted.

The Webhook container can be built out-of-band:

```bash
REPO="ghcr.io/deislabs/akri"
TAGS="v1"

docker build \
--tag=${REPO}:${TAGS} \
--file=./build/containers/Dockerfile.webhook-configuration \
.
